# Tabular Experimental Data

## Draft focus

Introduce `pandas` through fluorescence, growth, induction, and metadata tables.

## Starter example

```{python}
import pandas as pd

df = pd.DataFrame(
    {
        "sample": ["A", "B", "C"],
        "fluorescence": [1200, 3400, 2900],
        "od600": [0.4, 0.8, 0.7],
    }
)

df.assign(norm_fluorescence=df["fluorescence"] / df["od600"])
```
